title: Resolution Extending Sincerest Appreciation and Gratitude to Chancellor Dr. Jose V. Camacho, Jr. for Approving the Request of the Sangguniang Bayan to Allow Jeepney Operators/drivers Performating Public Utility Functions in the Municipality of Los Baños to Take a U-turn at the Uplb Gate. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Miko C. Pelegrina, Hon. Geronimo A. Ciceron, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Hon. Arlene P. Delos Santos, Hon. Jozyly
